pixfrog
Flash Features Docs About 🇫🇷 GitHub ↗
ESP32-P4 firmware

High-density LED control
on the ESP32-P4

pixfrog is an Art-Net 4 / sACN LED controller firmware: 8 parallel pixel outputs, DMX512, FSEQ shows from microSD, a colour on-device dashboard and an embedded web UI — tuned for deterministic, jitter-free pixel timing.

⚡ Flash your board 📖 Documentation 📦 Releases

What's inside

Built natively on ESP-IDF for the ESP32-P4, tuned for deterministic pixel timing.

🎚️

9 protocols + DMX512

WS2815, WS2812B, WS2811, SK6812, WS2814, APA102, SK9822, LPD8806 — or a full DMX512 universe out per channel, with per-channel color order, gamma and brightness.

🌐

Art-Net 4 + sACN

ArtDmx, Sync, Trigger, TimeCode and remote config over Ethernet; opt-in sACN (E1.31) with priorities and 2-source HTP/LTP merge — up to 48 universes.

⚡

Parallel DMA output

The ESP32-P4 PARLIO peripheral clocks all 8 channels in parallel out of PSRAM double buffers via DMA for rock-steady, jitter-free refresh.

🖥️

On-device UI

Colour TFT status dashboard (or classic OLED) driven by a rotary encoder — live FPS, link, per-channel activity and full configuration, no laptop needed.

🛰️

Web UI & OTA

Opt-in embedded web app: full configuration, live status, OTA updates with A/B rollback, JSON backup/restore, coredump download, optional auth.

🎬

FSEQ player

Plays xLights/FPP .fseq shows from microSD (zstd, hot-plug), free-running or slaved to ArtTimeCode and FPP MultiSync.

🎭

Scenes & failsafe

8 standalone scenes (solid / chase / rainbow) playable at boot, from the desk or any UI — plus a per-channel signal-loss failsafe.

💾

Persistent config

Every setting is stored in NVS and survives reboots, with a loud warning on the home screen if flash goes bad.

🧩

Octal PSRAM

200 MHz octal PSRAM holds the double-buffered frames while DMA-capable SRAM keeps the output path fast.

Read the architecture →

A real dashboard, on the device

The default 320×240 colour TFT shows network, services and per-channel activity at a glance — protocol, universe, pixels, brightness and a live status LED per output.

Get it on your board

Flash the latest build straight from desktop Chrome or Edge over USB — no toolchain required.

⚡ Flash your board 📦 Releases
